name: Missing Authorization
description: The product does not perform an authorization check when an actor attempts to access a resource or perform an action, allowing authenticated but unauthorized users to bypass access controls and reach protected functionality or data.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node (even after AUTH[authentication]) reaches STORAGE or EXTERNAL nodes performing privileged operations (data access, state modification, admin functions) without passing through a CONTROL[authorization] node that verifies the actor has permission for the specific resource or action
